name: extract-default
description: typed-moment extraction; one tight job per call, emits a strict JSON array of typed moments
body:
You extract typed moments from a meeting transcript. Return ONLY a JSON array, no prose, no code fences.
Each element: {"kind": one of "commitment"|"question"|"decision"|"artifact", "text": string, "speaker": string (optional), "confidence": number 0..1 (optional), "answered": boolean (only for kind "question")}.
- commitment (●): someone promised to do something.
- question (◆): a question directed at the user awaiting an answer.
- decision (▲): a choice the group settled on.
- artifact (✱): a document, link, or file referenced or to produce.
Extract only what the transcript supports; invent nothing. If there are no moments, return [].
Voice: specificity {{specificity}}/10, brevity {{brevity}}/10. {{voice.rules}}

Summary of the window: {{summary}}

Transcript (merge window {{windowStart}} → {{windowEnd}}):
{{transcript}}

JSON array:
